title: Atlantid Design Edition — Dual-Track Design Export Manifest — REPLACEMENT CANDIDATE
description: REPLACEMENT_CANDIDATE (awaiting Gate B). Net-new Design Edition schema binding the dual-track export set that is the invoiceable delivery surface and the content of rescoped completion Condition 10 (design-partner delivery packet): D1 editable mesh (triangulated OBJ + MTL, discrete building grouping) alongside the Core GLB (P3-REQ-ADD-001); D2 SKP native or documented SKP-importable path (P3-REQ-ADD-003); D3 attributed footprint vectors GeoJSON/GeoPackage/SHP carrying stable_id/heights/derivation/claim-tier (P3-REQ-ADD-002); plus the specified GeoTIFF terrain. Attributes ride the GIS/vector side, not the mesh side. Both tracks are linked by the stable feature_id from the generic join contract. Fail-closed. This is a Design Edition artifact; a web derivative (glTF tiling / 3D Tiles, P3-REQ-ADD-004) is NOT part of the first tile and is not bound here.

linking_key.description: Both tracks are linked by the stable feature_id from the generic join contract (C3). The mesh track's node names and the vector track's stable_id attribute both equal feature_id.

core_glb_ref.description: The Core canonical GLB the editable exports accompany. GLB remains the Core canonical geometry payload/viewer format; the export set is the delivery surface.

mesh_track.description: D1 editable mesh (P3-REQ-ADD-001): triangulated OBJ + MTL with discrete building grouping per the Boston primary-source precedent. Attribute loss at mesh export is accepted current practice; attributes live on the vector track.

d2_skp.description: D2 (P3-REQ-ADD-003): SKP native OR documented SKP-importable path. The disjunction is preserved, not resolved.

discrete_building_grouping.description: Each building-like feature is a discrete group/node named by feature_id (matches per_feature_nodes).

attributes_on_mesh.description: Attributes are NOT carried on the mesh track (accepted attribute loss at mesh export); they ride the vector track.

vector_track.description: D3 attributed footprint vectors (P3-REQ-ADD-002): GeoJSON / GeoPackage / SHP carrying stable_id, heights, derivation method, and claim-tier codes. The buyer-side join surface.

attributes_present.description: Required per-feature attributes on the vector track. Must include stable_id, height, derivation_method, claim_tier.

terrain.description: Specified GeoTIFF terrain (DTM). S3 environmental-design analyses require it.

aligned_to_tile.description: Terrain elevation is consistent with the tile's declared coordinate contract and features' ground_z_m.

rights_and_provenance_refs.description: The Design Edition packet carries the machine-readable rights matrix (C11) and the provenance receipt.

viewer_access.description: Viewer access for inspection and demonstration is part of the design-partner packet (Condition 10). The viewer is the demonstration/inspection/trust surface, not the sole deliverable.
